notes: v378 — PHASE 2 COMPLETE: your signal-grading formula now lives ONLY on your server. The maths that scores each signal — the edge, tier and strength — has been removed from the app's page entirely. It runs on your Cloudflare server and the app just displays the results, so anyone who 'views source' can no longer read your scoring formula. Everything looks and works exactly the same, and the ⚡ 'graded on your server' badge on the report card confirms it. If your server is ever briefly unreachable the card will say so and ask you to try again in a moment (rather than grading in the page); your prices, signals and portfolio are unaffected. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
